userEnteredValue.formulaValue: =ArrayFormula(ARRAY_CONSTRAIN({"Parent SKU";iferror(xlookup($B4:$B,'Define Format Terms'!$I:$I,'Define Format Terms'!$H:$H),"No product")},match("zzzz",$B$3:$B,1),1))
=ArrayFormula(ARRAY_CONSTRAIN({"SKU suffix";iferror(xlookup($D4:$D,'Define Format Terms'!$B:$B,'Define Format Terms'!$C:$C),"No unit")},match("zzzz",$B$3:$B,1),1))
